User.title: User
User.description: A user of the platform, either a client or a jobber.

uid.description: The unique identifier for the user.

role.description: The user's role on the platform.

reviewsCount.description: The total number of reviews for jobbers.

location.description: The user's general location or city.

Conversation.title: Conversation
Conversation.description: A chat conversation between two users.

id.description: The unique identifier for the conversation.

participants.description: The UIDs of the users in the conversation.

lastMessage.description: The text of the last message sent.

updatedAt.description: When the conversation was last updated.

Message.title: Message
Message.description: A single message in a conversation.

id.description: The unique identifier for the message.

conversationId.description: The ID of the conversation this message belongs to.

senderId.description: The UID of the user who sent the message.

Payment.title: Payment
Payment.description: A payment record for a booking.

id.description: The unique identifier for the payment.

bookingId.description: The ID of the booking this payment is for.

clientId.description: The UID of the client who made the payment.

jobberId.description: The UID of the jobber who will receive the payment.

Service.title: Service
Service.description: A type of service offered on the platform.

id.description: The unique identifier for the service.

description.description: A description of what the service entails.

basePrice.description: The starting price for the service.

id.description: The unique identifier for the booking.

clientId.description: The UID of the client who requested the service.

jobberId.description: The UID of the jobber assigned to the service.

serviceId.description: The ID of the service requested.

status.description: The current status of the booking.

date.description: The scheduled date and time for the service.

location.description: The address or location for the service.

totalAmount.description: The total cost of the service.

Review.title: Review
Review.description: A review left by a client for a jobber.

id.description: The unique identifier for the review.

bookingId.description: The ID of the booking this review is for.

fromId.description: The UID of the user who wrote the review.

fromName.description: The name of the user who wrote the review.

toId.description: The UID of the user being reviewed.
